name: Grey 》The Chase
description:
A packed party on a rainy Halloween night, too many drunk people packed into one place, and a hidden identity.

Grey's plan was to get close to you for once without fear that you'd reject him for being him.

But then Jax had to go and be a sleeze, and Grey's patience snapped.

Now you're running through the rain soaked woods with him hot on your heels, and that knife in his hand felt awful real.

popular!user

masked!char

AnyPOV

3 intros: 1 - they/them, 2 - she/her, 3 - he/him

Unestablished Relationship

tw: DEAD DOVE, fear play, knife play, bullying, primal/prey, pure smut

All Grey wanted was to get close to you without any preconceived notions.

But Jax had to look at you like that and now Grey wants to leave marks where everyone can see.

I will never stop making him. He's my comfort character. I know he already has a Halloween alt, but its an established relationship one, and I really want to run away from him.

Teehee.

ALSO!!!

I got to see the first fan art of Grey (with the artist's OC) and I may have cried a little.

I got permission from the artist to share it with you all!

Artist credit: existential-krisiss

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.
